<?php namespace Knuckles\Scribe\Extracting\Strategies\QueryParameters; use Knuckles\Scribe\Attributes\QueryParam; use Knuckles\Scribe\Extracting\Strategies\GetParamsFromAttributeStrategy; /** * @extends GetParamsFromAttributeStrategy<QueryParam> */ class GetFromQueryParamAttribute extends GetParamsFromAttributeStrategy { protected static array $attributeNames = [QueryParam::class]; }
